postgresqlDatabases.description: List of postgresql database configurations to be provisioned.

name.description: Name of the postgresql database (must be unique per namespace). The actual name of the database will be prefixed with the Kubernetes namespace to avoid naming collisions

mode.description: Lifecycle mode which is either standard or protected. Production databases should be protected

global.description: Included to allow chart to be used as subchart as helm will inject .global from the top chart.

idp_oidc_provider_url.description: This value is set automatically by ArgoCD, but can be overridden here for local testing.

idp_aws_account.description: This value is set automatically by ArgoCD, but can be overridden here for local testing.
